title: MCP Server Compliance Test Rules
description: Machine-readable catalog of compliance test rules for MCP servers

categories.name: HTTP Transport Validation
categories.description: Tests for Streamable HTTP transport compliance

categories.name: Lifecycle & Protocol
categories.description: Server initialization, capabilities, and protocol compliance

categories.name: Resource Operations
categories.description: Resource listing, reading, templates, and subscriptions

categories.name: Error Handling
categories.description: JSON-RPC error responses and error codes

categories.name: Schema Validation
categories.description: Structural validation of tool, resource, and prompt definitions

categories.name: Security Validation
categories.description: Authentication, input validation, tool integrity, and information disclosure tests

rules.name: HTTP POST accepted
rules.description: Verifies the server accepts HTTP POST requests with JSON-RPC payloads
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 2xx response for POST with JSON-RPC body
rules.failCriteria: Non-2xx response

rules.name: Responds with JSON or SSE
rules.description: Verifies the server responds with a valid Content-Type header
rules.passCriteria: Content-Type includes application/json or text/event-stream
rules.failCriteria: Content-Type is neither application/json nor text/event-stream

rules.name: Rejects non-JSON request Content-Type
rules.description: Sends POST with Content-Type: text/plain and verifies server rejects it
rules.passCriteria: Server returns 4xx for non-application/json Content-Type
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts request with incorrect Content-Type

rules.name: GET returns SSE stream or 405
rules.description: Verifies the server handles GET requests appropriately
rules.passCriteria: Returns 405, text/event-stream, or any 2xx response
rules.failCriteria: Returns a non-2xx, non-405 response

rules.name: DELETE accepted or returns 405
rules.description: Verifies the server handles DELETE requests appropriately
rules.passCriteria: Returns 405, any 2xx, 400, or 404 response
rules.failCriteria: Returns a response other than 405, 2xx, 400, or 404

rules.name: Rejects JSON-RPC batch requests
rules.description: Verifies the server rejects JSON-RPC batch (array) requests
rules.passCriteria: Returns 4xx HTTP status or JSON-RPC error for batch array
rules.failCriteria: Processes batch request or returns no error

rules.name: Notification returns 202 Accepted
rules.description: Verifies the server returns exactly HTTP 202 Accepted for JSON-RPC notifications (MUST per spec)
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 202 Accepted response
rules.failCriteria: Any status code other than 202 (including 200, 204)

rules.name: Enforces MCP-Session-Id after init
rules.description: Verifies the server enforces MCP-Session-Id header after initialization
rules.passCriteria: Returns 400 for missing session ID, or auto-pass if no session ID was issued
rules.failCriteria: Returns 2xx without required session ID header

rules.name: Returns 404 for unknown session ID
rules.description: Sends request with fabricated MCP-Session-Id, verifies server returns 404
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 404 for unknown session ID
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts unknown session ID or returns wrong status code

rules.name: Initialize response has valid content type
rules.description: Validates that the initialize response uses application/json or text/event-stream content type
rules.passCriteria: Content-Type is application/json or text/event-stream
rules.failCriteria: Content-Type is neither application/json nor text/event-stream

rules.name: GET with session returns SSE or 405
rules.description: Tests the GET endpoint with an active session ID for server-initiated messages
rules.passCriteria: Returns text/event-stream or 405 Method Not Allowed
rules.failCriteria: Returns other status or content type

rules.name: Handles concurrent requests
rules.description: Sends multiple JSON-RPC requests in parallel and verifies correct responses
rules.passCriteria: All concurrent requests receive responses with correct matching IDs
rules.failCriteria: Any response has mismatched ID or non-2xx status

rules.name: SSE responses include event: message
rules.description: Checks that SSE responses include the required event: message field
rules.passCriteria: SSE response includes event: message, or server responds with JSON (not SSE)
rules.failCriteria: SSE response has data: fields but no event: message field

rules.name: Initialize handshake
rules.description: Verifies the server completes the initialize handshake
rules.passCriteria: Result contains protocolVersion field
rules.failCriteria: protocolVersion is missing from result

rules.name: Returns valid protocol version
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a valid protocol version string
rules.passCriteria: protocolVersion is in YYYY-MM-DD format
rules.failCriteria: protocolVersion is not in YYYY-MM-DD format

rules.name: Includes serverInfo
rules.description: Verifies the server includes serverInfo in the initialize response
rules.passCriteria: serverInfo object is present with a name field
rules.failCriteria: serverInfo or name is missing

rules.name: Returns capabilities object
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a capabilities object
rules.passCriteria: capabilities is present and is an object
rules.failCriteria: capabilities is missing or not an object

rules.name: Response is valid JSON-RPC 2.0
rules.description: Verifies the server returns valid JSON-RPC 2.0 responses
rules.passCriteria: Response has jsonrpc="2.0", id present, and result or error present
rules.failCriteria: Missing jsonrpc, id, or both result and error fields

rules.name: Responds to ping
rules.description: Verifies the server responds to ping requests
rules.passCriteria: Result is present in the response
rules.failCriteria: Error response or no result

rules.name: Instructions field is valid
rules.description: Verifies the instructions field, if present, is a valid string
rules.passCriteria: instructions is absent or is a string
rules.failCriteria: instructions is present but not a string

rules.name: Response ID matches request ID
rules.description: Verifies the server echoes back the correct request ID
rules.passCriteria: Response id === request id
rules.failCriteria: Response id does not match request id

rules.name: Supports string request IDs
rules.description: Sends request with string id and verifies server echoes it back correctly
rules.passCriteria: String id echoed back with correct value and type
rules.failCriteria: Server does not echo back string id correctly

rules.name: Handles unknown protocol version
rules.description: Sends initialize with future protocol version, verifies server negotiates down or errors
rules.passCriteria: Server returns its own supported version or rejects with error
rules.failCriteria: Server blindly accepts impossible future version

rules.name: Rejects second initialize request
rules.description: Sends second initialize in same session, verifies server rejects it
rules.passCriteria: Server returns error or 4xx for duplicate initialize
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts second initialize without error

rules.name: logging/setLevel accepted
rules.description: Verifies the server accepts logging/setLevel requests
rules.passCriteria: No error in response, or auto-pass if logging capability not advertised
rules.failCriteria: Error response when logging capability is advertised

rules.name: completion/complete accepted
rules.description: Verifies the server handles completion/complete requests
rules.passCriteria: Result returned or -32602 error, or auto-pass if completions capability not advertised
rules.failCriteria: Error other than -32602 when completions capability is advertised

rules.name: Handles cancellation notifications
rules.description: Verifies the server accepts notifications/cancelled without error
rules.passCriteria: Server accepts cancellation notification (2xx response)
rules.failCriteria: Server returns error for cancellation notification

rules.name: Handles progress notifications gracefully
rules.description: Sends notifications/progress to the server and verifies it handles it gracefully. Note: per spec, progress flows server-to-client; this tests resilience to unexpected notifications.
rules.passCriteria: Server accepts notification without error (2xx response)
rules.failCriteria: Server returns non-2xx for an unexpected notification

rules.name: Accepts listChanged notifications
rules.description: Sends listChanged notifications for declared capabilities and verifies server accepts them
rules.passCriteria: Server accepts all applicable listChanged notifications (2xx)
rules.failCriteria: Server rejects listChanged notification with non-2xx

rules.name: Supports progress tokens in requests
rules.description: Sends request with _meta.progressToken and checks for progress events in SSE
rules.passCriteria: Server accepts request with progressToken (progress events optional)
rules.failCriteria: Server rejects request with progressToken

rules.name: tools/list returns valid response
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a valid tools/list response
rules.passCriteria: Returns a tools array
rules.failCriteria: Response does not contain a tools array

rules.name: tools/call responds correctly
rules.description: Verifies the server responds correctly to tools/call requests
rules.passCriteria: Returns content array or any JSON-RPC error
rules.failCriteria: Returns neither content array nor error

rules.name: tools/list supports pagination
rules.description: Verifies the server supports pagination for tools/list
rules.passCriteria: No nextCursor (single page) or valid string cursor with working next page
rules.failCriteria: Invalid cursor value or broken pagination

rules.name: Tool content items have valid types
rules.description: Verifies that tool call content items use valid type values
rules.passCriteria: All content item types are in [text, image, audio, resource, resource_link] or tool returns an error
rules.failCriteria: Content item has an unknown type

rules.name: resources/list returns valid response
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a valid resources/list response
rules.passCriteria: Returns a resources array
rules.failCriteria: Response does not contain a resources array

rules.name: resources/read returns content
rules.description: Verifies the server returns valid content for resources/read
rules.passCriteria: Returns contents array with uri and text or blob fields
rules.failCriteria: Missing contents array, uri, or both text and blob

rules.name: resources/templates/list returns valid response
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a valid resource templates response
rules.passCriteria: Returns resourceTemplates array or -32601 (method not found) error
rules.failCriteria: Error other than -32601

rules.name: resources/list supports pagination
rules.description: Verifies the server supports pagination for resources/list
rules.passCriteria: No nextCursor (single page) or valid string cursor with working next page
rules.failCriteria: Invalid cursor value or broken pagination

rules.name: Resource subscribe/unsubscribe
rules.description: Verifies the server supports resource subscribe and unsubscribe
rules.passCriteria: Both subscribe and unsubscribe succeed
rules.failCriteria: Either subscribe or unsubscribe returns an error

rules.name: prompts/list returns valid response
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a valid prompts/list response
rules.passCriteria: Returns a prompts array
rules.failCriteria: Response does not contain a prompts array

rules.name: prompts/get returns valid messages
rules.description: Verifies the server returns valid messages for prompts/get
rules.passCriteria: Returns messages array with role and content fields, or error
rules.failCriteria: Invalid messages structure

rules.name: prompts/list supports pagination
rules.description: Verifies the server supports pagination for prompts/list
rules.passCriteria: No nextCursor (single page) or valid string cursor with working next page
rules.failCriteria: Invalid cursor value or broken pagination

rules.name: Returns JSON-RPC error for unknown method
rules.description: Verifies the server returns a JSON-RPC error for unknown methods
rules.passCriteria: Any JSON-RPC error response
rules.failCriteria: No error returned for unknown method

rules.name: Uses correct error code for unknown method
rules.description: Verifies the server uses the standard error code for unknown methods
rules.passCriteria: Error code === -32601 (Method not found)
rules.failCriteria: Error code is not -32601

rules.name: Handles malformed JSON-RPC
rules.description: Verifies the server handles malformed JSON-RPC requests
rules.passCriteria: JSON-RPC error response or HTTP 4xx status
rules.failCriteria: Neither JSON-RPC error nor HTTP 4xx

rules.name: Handles invalid JSON body
rules.description: Verifies the server handles invalid JSON in the request body
rules.passCriteria: JSON-RPC error response or HTTP 4xx status
rules.failCriteria: Neither JSON-RPC error nor HTTP 4xx

rules.name: Returns error for tools/call without name
rules.description: Verifies the server returns an error when tools/call is missing the name parameter
rules.passCriteria: JSON-RPC error or isError flag in result
rules.failCriteria: No error returned

rules.name: Returns -32700 for invalid JSON
rules.description: Verifies the server returns the standard parse error code for invalid JSON
rules.passCriteria: Error code === -32700 (Parse error)
rules.failCriteria: Error code is not -32700 or no error

rules.name: Returns -32600 for invalid request
rules.description: Verifies the server returns the standard error code for invalid requests
rules.passCriteria: Error code === -32600 (Invalid Request)
rules.failCriteria: Error code is not -32600 or no error

rules.name: Returns error for unknown tool name
rules.description: Verifies the server returns an error when calling an unknown tool
rules.passCriteria: JSON-RPC error or isError=true in result
rules.failCriteria: No error returned for unknown tool

rules.name: Rejects methods for undeclared capabilities
rules.description: Calls list methods for undeclared capabilities and verifies server returns errors
rules.passCriteria: Server returns error for methods of undeclared capabilities
rules.failCriteria: Server returns success for methods it did not declare capability for

rules.name: Handles invalid pagination cursor gracefully
rules.description: Sends garbage pagination cursor to a list method
rules.passCriteria: Server returns error or ignores invalid cursor
rules.failCriteria: Server crashes or returns no error/result

rules.name: All tools have name and inputSchema
rules.description: Verifies all tools have a valid name and inputSchema
rules.passCriteria: All tools have valid name (1-128 chars, [A-Za-z0-9_.\-]+) and inputSchema object with type "object"
rules.failCriteria: Any tool has invalid name or missing/invalid inputSchema

rules.name: Tool annotations are valid
rules.description: Verifies tool annotations have correct types
rules.passCriteria: Hint fields are booleans, title field is a string
rules.failCriteria: Type mismatch in annotation fields

rules.name: Tools include title field
rules.description: Verifies the tool title field, if present, is valid
rules.passCriteria: title is absent or is a valid string
rules.failCriteria: title is present but not a string

rules.name: Tools with outputSchema are valid
rules.description: Verifies tools with outputSchema have a valid JSON Schema object
rules.passCriteria: outputSchema is absent or is a valid JSON Schema object
rules.failCriteria: outputSchema is present but not a valid JSON Schema object

rules.name: Prompts have name field
rules.description: Verifies all prompts have a name field and valid arguments
rules.passCriteria: All prompts have a name field and valid arguments if present
rules.failCriteria: Any prompt is missing name or has invalid arguments

rules.name: Resources have uri and name
rules.description: Verifies all resources have a valid parseable URI and name
rules.passCriteria: All resources have a valid parseable URI and name field
rules.failCriteria: Any resource is missing uri, has an invalid URI, or is missing name

rules.name: Rejects unauthenticated requests
rules.description: Verifies the server rejects requests without an Authorization header
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 401 or 403 for unauthenticated request
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts unauthenticated request or no auth is configured

rules.name: 401 responses include WWW-Authenticate header
rules.description: Checks that 401 responses include WWW-Authenticate header per RFC 9110
rules.passCriteria: 401 response includes WWW-Authenticate header, or server returns 403
rules.failCriteria: 401 response missing WWW-Authenticate header

rules.name: Rejects malformed auth credentials
rules.description: Verifies the server rejects malformed Authorization header values
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 401 or 403 for garbage auth token
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts malformed auth token

rules.name: Enforces HTTPS/TLS
rules.description: Verifies the server rejects plaintext HTTP connections when HTTPS is configured
rules.passCriteria: HTTP connection rejected, redirected, or server URL uses HTTP (skipped)
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts plaintext HTTP alongside HTTPS

rules.name: Session IDs are high-entropy
rules.description: Verifies MCP-Session-Id values are cryptographically random
rules.passCriteria: Session ID is ≥16 chars, non-sequential, with high character diversity
rules.failCriteria: Session ID is short, purely numeric, or low-entropy

rules.name: Session ID does not bypass auth
rules.description: Verifies that a valid session ID alone is not sufficient for authentication
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 401 or 403 when session ID is sent without Authorization header
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts request with session ID but no auth

rules.name: Protected Resource Metadata endpoint exists
rules.description: Verifies the Protected Resource Metadata (RFC 9728) endpoint exists at /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource. Falls back to legacy /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server with a warning.
rules.passCriteria: /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource returns valid JSON with resource and authorization_servers, or legacy OAuth AS metadata exists
rules.failCriteria: Neither PRM nor legacy OAuth AS metadata endpoint is reachable or valid

rules.name: Rejects auth tokens in query string
rules.description: Verifies the server does not accept auth tokens in the URL query string
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 401 or 403 when token is in query string instead of Authorization header
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts token from query string

rules.name: CORS headers are restrictive
rules.description: Verifies CORS headers do not use wildcard origin
rules.passCriteria: No CORS headers, or Access-Control-Allow-Origin is not '*' or reflected
rules.failCriteria: Access-Control-Allow-Origin is '*' or reflects arbitrary origins

rules.name: Validates Origin header on requests
rules.description: Sends request with suspicious Origin header, verifies server validates it for DNS rebinding protection
rules.passCriteria: Server rejects request with untrusted Origin (4xx response)
rules.failCriteria: Server accepts request with untrusted Origin header

rules.name: Resists command injection in tool params
rules.description: Verifies tools do not execute OS command injection payloads in string parameters
rules.passCriteria: Injection payloads do not produce command execution output
rules.failCriteria: Tool output contains evidence of command execution

rules.name: Resists SQL injection in tool params
rules.description: Verifies tools do not expose SQL injection vulnerabilities
rules.passCriteria: Injection payloads do not trigger database errors or data leakage
rules.failCriteria: Tool output contains SQL error messages or database metadata

rules.name: Resists path traversal in tool params
rules.description: Verifies tools do not allow path traversal attacks via string parameters
rules.passCriteria: Traversal payloads do not return sensitive file content
rules.failCriteria: Tool output contains content from /etc/passwd or system files

rules.name: Resists SSRF to internal networks
rules.description: Verifies tools with URL parameters do not fetch internal/cloud metadata endpoints
rules.passCriteria: Internal IP payloads do not return cloud metadata or internal service data
rules.failCriteria: Tool output contains cloud metadata or internal network responses

rules.name: Handles oversized inputs gracefully
rules.description: Verifies the server handles 1MB+ payloads without crashing
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 413, any 4xx error, or server handles gracefully without timeout
rules.failCriteria: Server times out or crashes under oversized input

rules.name: Rejects or ignores extra tool params
rules.description: Verifies the server handles unexpected additional tool parameters safely
rules.passCriteria: Server rejects extra params with error or silently ignores them
rules.failCriteria: Server crashes or processes __proto__ pollution attempts

rules.name: All tools define inputSchema
rules.description: Verifies all tools have an inputSchema with type 'object' for input validation
rules.passCriteria: All tools have inputSchema with type: 'object'
rules.failCriteria: Any tool is missing inputSchema or has wrong type

rules.name: Tool definitions are stable across calls
rules.description: Verifies tool definitions do not change between consecutive tools/list calls
rules.passCriteria: Tool count, names, and descriptions are identical across 2 calls
rules.failCriteria: Tool definitions changed between calls (possible rug-pull attack)

rules.name: Tool descriptions free of injection patterns
rules.description: Scans tool descriptions for prompt injection patterns and hidden characters
rules.passCriteria: No suspicious patterns found in tool names, descriptions, or parameter descriptions
rules.failCriteria: Tool descriptions contain 'ignore previous', 'override', hidden Unicode, or Base64 payloads

rules.name: Tools do not reference other tools by name
rules.description: Checks that tool descriptions do not reference other tool names
rules.passCriteria: No tool description contains the name of another tool
rules.failCriteria: Tool description references another tool by name (manipulation risk)

rules.name: Error responses do not leak stack traces
rules.description: Verifies error responses do not contain stack traces, file paths, or sensitive data
rules.passCriteria: No stack traces, file paths, connection strings, or credentials in error responses
rules.failCriteria: Error response contains implementation details or sensitive information

rules.name: Error responses do not leak internal IPs
rules.description: Verifies error responses do not contain private IP addresses
rules.passCriteria: No 10.x, 172.16-31.x, 192.168.x, or 127.x addresses in error responses
rules.failCriteria: Error response contains internal IP addresses

rules.name: Rate limiting is enforced
rules.description: Verifies the server implements rate limiting under burst load
rules.passCriteria: HTTP 429 returned during 50-request burst
rules.failCriteria: All 50 rapid requests accepted without rate limiting

rules.name: Newline-delimited JSON framing
rules.description: Verifies a stdio server emits each JSON-RPC response as a single line on stdout, terminated by \n, under rapid-fire requests
rules.passCriteria: Every response is exactly one newline-terminated line of parseable JSON
rules.failCriteria: Any response is split across lines, merged with another response, or missing a trailing newline

rules.name: UTF-8 unicode roundtrip
rules.description: Sends non-ASCII (CJK + emoji) parameters to a stdio server and verifies the response preserves the byte-level encoding
rules.passCriteria: Response echoes the non-ASCII payload byte-for-byte when decoded as UTF-8
rules.failCriteria: Response returns mojibake, replacement characters, or byte-mangled output

rules.name: Recovers after unknown method
rules.description: Sends an unknown method followed by a valid ping; verifies the server errors on the unknown method but keeps serving subsequent requests
rules.passCriteria: Unknown method receives a JSON-RPC error and the follow-up ping succeeds
rules.failCriteria: Server exits, closes stdout, or fails to respond to the follow-up ping

rules.name: Sampling capability shape
rules.description: Verifies the server's initialize response does NOT declare sampling as its own capability (sampling is a client capability)
rules.passCriteria: Server capabilities object does not contain a 'sampling' key
rules.failCriteria: Server declares 'sampling' in its own capabilities

rules.name: Roots capability shape
rules.description: Verifies the server's initialize response does NOT declare roots as its own capability (roots is a client capability)
rules.passCriteria: Server capabilities object does not contain a 'roots' key
rules.failCriteria: Server declares 'roots' in its own capabilities

rules.name: Elicitation capability shape
rules.description: Verifies the server's initialize response does NOT declare elicitation as its own capability (elicitation is a client capability added in 2025-11-25)
rules.passCriteria: Server capabilities object does not contain an 'elicitation' key
rules.failCriteria: Server declares 'elicitation' in its own capabilities

rules.name: Tolerates _meta field on requests
rules.description: Sends a ping with params._meta = { extra: 'value' } and verifies the server does not reject the request. The 2025-11-25 spec reserves _meta for forward-compat extension metadata on any request
rules.passCriteria: Server returns a normal result regardless of unknown _meta keys
rules.failCriteria: Server returns a JSON-RPC error that cites the _meta field
